name: @hackefeller/kernel
description: Upgrade an AI agent with stronger workflows, templates, and execution guidance.
author: Charles Ponti

scripts.build: bun run generate:template-refs && bun build ./src/cli/main.ts --compile --outfile ./dist/kernel && cp ./package.json ./dist/
scripts.build:bin: bun run generate:template-refs && bun build ./src/cli/main.ts --compile --outfile ./dist/kernel && cp ./package.json ./dist/
scripts.build:dev: bun run generate:template-refs && bun build ./src/cli/main.ts --compile --outfile ./dist/kernel-dev && cp ./package.json ./dist/
